title: KrakenD TLS Configuration
description: TLS configuration for enabling HTTPS on the KrakenD API Gateway, including certificate paths, minimum TLS version, and cipher suite preferences.

public_key.description: Path to the public key or certificate PEM file.

private_key.description: Path to the private key PEM file.

curve_preferences.description: Elliptic curve preferences for TLS handshake.

prefer_server_cipher_suites.description: Whether to prefer the server cipher suite order.

cipher_suites.description: List of supported cipher suite IDs.

disabled.description: Disables TLS even when certificate files are present.

ca_certs.description: Paths to CA certificate files for mTLS client verification.
